---
title: "play_with_git"
editor: visual
format: html
author: Naomi
---

# Use this to play with git and github

I can explore 
* revert
* reset
* checkout

Lets make this one committed

# What about conflicts - I can make a change here and commit it and then make a change on github and see what happens when I pull the changes to my local repo
Now I'm going to edit on github
